moments.title: England face Ghana in World Cup group stage
moments.blurb: England play Ghana today in the FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage in Boston, aiming to continue their strong start to the tournament.

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: It's World Cup match day! England take on Ghana later today. Prediction time: who's scoring the first goal and what's the final score?

angles.name: Team Talk
angles.copy: Gareth Southgate's squad are in action today against Ghana. What are your thoughts on the starting XI and key players for this crucial group game?

moments.title: UK braces for record-breaking heatwave
moments.blurb: Parts of central and southern England and Wales are under Red and Amber Extreme Heat Warnings this week, with temperatures forecast to hit 39-40°C and potentially break June records.

angles.name: Beat the Heat
angles.copy: Record-breaking heat is hitting the UK this week! How are you staying cool and hydrated in these extreme temperatures? Share your tips!

angles.name: Weather Warning
angles.copy: Red and Amber heat warnings are in place for England and Wales this week, with temps soaring to 39-40°C. Stay safe, check on vulnerable neighbours, and keep cool.

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships begin next week
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships, the third Grand Slam tennis tournament of the year, is set to begin on Monday, June 29, running until July 12.

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries and cream! Wimbledon kicks off next Monday, June 29th. Who are your picks for the men's and women's singles titles?

angles.name: Road to SW19
angles.copy: The world's best tennis players head to SW19 next week for Wimbledon 2026. What's your favourite Wimbledon memory?

moments.title: England Men's Test Cricket vs New Zealand at Trent Bridge
moments.blurb: England's men's cricket team will face New Zealand in a Test match at Trent Bridge, Nottingham, from Thursday, June 25 to Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Trent Bridge Test
angles.copy: Big week for England Cricket! The Test series against New Zealand continues at Trent Bridge from Thursday. Can Ben Stokes' side secure a win?

angles.name: Bazball in Nottingham
angles.copy: The Blackcaps are at Trent Bridge this week! Get ready for some 'Bazball' action as England take on New Zealand in the Test match.

moments.title: State Fayre Festival hits Chelmsford this weekend
moments.blurb: The brand new State Fayre Festival runs from June 26-28 at Hylands Park in Chelmsford, Essex, featuring headliners Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette, and The Lumineers.

angles.name: Chelmsford Calling
angles.copy: State Fayre Festival is almost here! Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette, and The Lumineers are heading to Hylands Park this weekend. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Three days of live music, BBQ, and good times at State Fayre Festival in Chelmsford from Friday! Get your festival plans sorted!

moments.title: Everywhere at Once Festival supports grassroots venues
moments.blurb: The 'Everywhere at Once' Festival takes place across hundreds of grassroots music venues throughout the UK from June 26-28, showcasing major artists and emerging talent.

angles.name: Local Music Love
angles.copy: Forget the fields, it's a festival on your doorstep! 'Everywhere at Once' is bringing live music to grassroots venues across the UK this weekend. Support your local scene!

angles.name: UK-Wide Gigs
angles.copy: Hundreds of venues, one massive weekend! The 'Everywhere at Once' Festival, June 26-28, is celebrating live music from Inverness to Penzance. Find a gig near you!

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off this weekend
moments.blurb: The inaugural Blenheim Palace Festival begins Saturday, June 27, featuring Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Michael Bublé, and Pete Tong Ibiza Classics.

angles.name: Palace Party
angles.copy: Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Michael Bublé! The stunning Blenheim Palace Festival starts this Saturday. Who's got tickets to this incredible lineup?

angles.name: Iconic Venue, Iconic Acts
angles.copy: From pop royalty to dance anthems, Blenheim Palace Festival brings huge names to an epic backdrop, starting June 27th. Get ready for a week of amazing music!

moments.title: Taylor Swift & Ariana Grande top recent UK Singles Charts
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift secured her seventh UK #1 on June 12 with 'I Knew It, I Knew You', following Ariana Grande's 'Hate That I Made You Love Me' topping the chart on June 5.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Huge congrats to Taylor Swift for her latest UK #1, 'I Knew It, I Knew You'! What a month for pop, with Ariana Grande also recently hitting the top spot.

angles.name: Pop Powerhouses
angles.copy: Two massive artists, two recent #1s! Taylor Swift and Ariana Grande are dominating the UK singles chart. Which track is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday to Oasis guitarist Paul 'Bonehead' Arthurs!
moments.blurb: Paul 'Bonehead' Arthurs, the co-founding rhythm guitarist of iconic Britpop band Oasis, turns 61 today.

angles.name: Bonehead Turns 61
angles.copy: Big happy 61st birthday to the legendary Paul 'Bonehead' Arthurs, co-founder and rhythm guitarist of Oasis! What's your favourite Oasis track?

angles.name: Britpop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Bonehead's 61st today! The man who helped shape the sound of Oasis. Send your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Happy 70th Birthday to Randy Jackson!
moments.blurb: Musician, producer, and former American Idol judge Randy Jackson, known for his work with Journey, celebrates his 70th birthday today.

angles.name: Dawg's Big Birthday
angles.copy: Seventy today for the one and only Randy Jackson! From Journey to American Idol, a true music legend. Happy birthday, dawg!

angles.name: Music Maestro
angles.copy: Happy 70th to Randy Jackson! An incredible career spanning decades, from session bassist to TV judge. What's your favourite Journey song?

moments.title: Happy 49th Birthday to Jason Mraz!
moments.blurb: Two-time Grammy Award-winning singer-songwriter Jason Mraz, known for hits like 'I'm Yours', turns 49 today.

angles.name: Mraz Turns 49
angles.copy: Happy 49th birthday to the incredibly talented Jason Mraz! Still 'Yours' after all these years. What's your go-to Mraz track?

angles.name: Feel-Good Tunes
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Jason Mraz, 49 today! His optimistic lyrics and smooth vocals always put a smile on our faces.

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday to KT Tunstall!
moments.blurb: Scottish singer-songwriter KT Tunstall, known for hits like 'Suddenly I See' and 'Black Horse and the Cherry Tree', celebrates her 51st birthday today.

angles.name: Scottish Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to Scotland's own KT Tunstall! From 'Suddenly I See' to 'Black Horse and the Cherry Tree', a true talent. What's your favourite song?

angles.name: Suddenly 51!
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 51st birthday to the brilliant KT Tunstall! Still rocking after all these years.

moments.title: Happy 68th Birthday to Imagination's Leee John!
moments.blurb: Leee John, lead vocalist of the iconic British R&B/soul band Imagination, known for hits like 'Body Talk' and 'Just an Illusion', turns 68 today.

angles.name: Imagination's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 68th birthday to the incredible Leee John of Imagination! Still grooving to 'Just an Illusion'. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the fantastic Leee John, 68 today! A true British R&B and soul legend. Send your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Happy 71st Birthday to The Clash's Mick Jones!
moments.blurb: Mick Jones, co-founder, guitarist, and vocalist of legendary punk rock band The Clash, turns 71 on Thursday, June 26.

angles.name: Clash Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 71st birthday to the legendary Mick Jones of The Clash this Thursday! What's your all-time favourite Clash anthem?

angles.name: Punk Pioneer
angles.copy: Mick Jones, 71 this week! From 'London Calling' to 'Should I Stay or Should I Go', a true punk pioneer. Cheers to the guitarist!

moments.title: Happy 70th Birthday to Chris Isaak!
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter and actor Chris Isaak, known for his distinctive voice and hit song 'Wicked Game', celebrates his 70th birthday on Thursday, June 26.

angles.name: Wicked Game Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 70th birthday to the iconic Chris Isaak this Thursday! Still mesmerised by 'Wicked Game'. What's your favourite song by him?

angles.name: Smooth Operator
angles.copy: Celebrating Chris Isaak's 70th on June 26th! That voice, those tunes. A true original. Send your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Happy 84th Birthday to The Beach Boys' Bruce Johnston!
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, long-standing member of The Beach Boys, known for his harmonies and songwriting contributions, turns 84 on Friday, June 27.

angles.name: Beach Boy's Birthday
angles.copy: Good vibrations for Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys, turning 84 this Friday! What's your favourite Beach Boys classic?

angles.name: Surfin' Safari at 84
angles.copy: Happy 84th to Bruce Johnston! A key part of The Beach Boys' legendary sound. Celebrate with some iconic harmonies this Friday!

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday to Deep Purple's Ian Paice!
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the only continuous member and drummer of the legendary rock band Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Deep Purple Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the powerhouse drummer of Deep Purple, Ian Paice, this Monday! What's your favourite Deep Purple track?

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: 78 years young for Ian Paice! The rhythmic backbone of Deep Purple. Celebrate the rock legend's birthday on June 29th!

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday to Nicole Scherzinger!
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, lead vocalist of The Pussycat Dolls, turns 48 on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 48th birthday to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger this Monday! From 'Don't Cha' to 'Jai Ho', a true pop icon. What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls song?

angles.name: Pop Queen at 48
angles.copy: Celebrating Nicole Scherzinger's birthday on June 29th! Lead Pussycat Doll and all-round superstar. Send your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday to Men at Work's Colin Hay!
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, lead singer of the Australian new wave band Men at Work, known for hits like 'Down Under', celebrates his 73rd birthday on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Down Under Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the fantastic Colin Hay of Men at Work this Monday! Still wondering if you can hear the thunder. What's your favourite song?

angles.name: Aussie Legend at 73
angles.copy: Celebrating Colin Hay's birthday on June 29th! The voice behind 'Down Under' and many more classics. Send your wishes!
